data.html_notes:
1. POST │ /username/suggest │ Suggest a UMA username from email during onboarding │ { email } │ { username }
  2. POST │ /username/check │ Real-time availability check (debounced 500ms while typing) │ { username } │ { available, reason? }
Update on exisiting APIs 3. POST │ /wallets │ Register wallet + claim username; returns the UMA config │ { addresses{}, accountIndex, meta{}, username } │ [{ ...wallet, uma: { domain, minSendable, maxSendable, defaultSettlementLayer } }] 4. GET │ /wallets │ Fetch wallets incl. UMA domain/limits │ — │ { wallets: [{ ..., uma{} }] }
data.name: [UMA] Implement backend APIs for the UMA feature set
